title: Verify BRD Document Upload - Valid PDF
description: Validates that a user can successfully upload a BRD document in PDF format.
preconditions: User is logged in to the TCMS.

steps.expected: The upload interface is displayed.

steps.step: Select a valid BRD document in PDF format (e.g., 'sample_brd.pdf').
steps.expected: The file name is displayed next to the upload button.
A success message is displayed, and the document is listed as uploaded.

title: Verify BRD Document Upload - Valid DOCX
description: Validates that a user can successfully upload a BRD document in DOCX format.
preconditions: User is logged in to the TCMS.

steps.expected: The upload interface is displayed.

steps.step: Select a valid BRD document in DOCX format (e.g., 'sample_brd.docx').
steps.expected: The file name is displayed next to the upload button.
A success message is displayed, and the document is listed as uploaded.

title: Verify BRD Document Upload - Invalid File Type
description: Validates that the system rejects uploading documents with unsupported file types.
preconditions: User is logged in to the TCMS.

steps.expected: The upload interface is displayed.

steps.step: Select an invalid file type (e.g., 'image.jpg' or 'script.js').
steps.expected: The file name is displayed next to the upload button.
An error message indicating 'Unsupported file type' or similar is displayed, and the document is not uploaded.

title: Verify BRD Document Upload - Large File Size
description: Validates the system's behavior when uploading a BRD document exceeding the maximum allowed file size.
preconditions: User is logged in to the TCMS.
A BRD document exceeding the system's maximum allowed size (e.g., 50MB) is available.

steps.expected: The upload interface is displayed.
The file name is displayed next to the upload button.
An error message indicating 'File size exceeds limit' or similar is displayed, and the document is not uploaded.

title: Verify AI Test Case Generation from Valid BRD
description: Validates that the system can successfully generate relevant test cases from a properly formatted BRD document using AI.
preconditions: User is logged in to the TCMS.
A valid BRD document has been successfully uploaded (e.g., 'sample_brd.pdf').

steps.step: Navigate to the 'Generate Test Cases' section.
steps.expected: The generation interface is displayed, showing uploaded BRD documents.
The document is selected for generation.
A loading indicator is displayed, and then a list of newly generated test cases appears, relevant to the BRD content.

title: Verify AI Test Case Generation from Empty BRD
description: Validates the system's behavior when attempting to generate test cases from an empty or nearly empty BRD document.
preconditions: User is logged in to the TCMS.
An empty or minimal BRD document (e.g., 'empty_brd.pdf') has been successfully uploaded.

steps.step: Navigate to the 'Generate Test Cases' section.
steps.expected: The generation interface is displayed.
The document is selected.
Either a message indicating 'No requirements found' or a very small number of generic test cases are generated, or an error/warning is displayed.

title: Verify Triggering Single Test Execution
description: Validates that a user can trigger the execution of a single, selected test case.
preconditions: User is logged in to the TCMS.
At least one test case with an associated Playwright script exists in the system.

steps.expected: A list of available test cases is displayed.

steps.step: Select a specific test case (e.g., 'TC-001: Login with valid credentials').
steps.expected: The test case is highlighted or checked.
A confirmation dialog appears, or a message indicating 'Execution started' is displayed, and the test case status changes to 'Running'.

title: Verify Triggering Multiple Test Executions
description: Validates that a user can trigger the execution of multiple selected test cases simultaneously.
preconditions: User is logged in to the TCMS.
Multiple test cases with associated Playwright scripts exist in the system.

steps.expected: A list of available test cases is displayed.
The selected test cases are highlighted or checked.
A confirmation dialog appears, or a message indicating 'Execution started for X test cases' is displayed, and the status of selected test cases changes to 'Running'.

title: Verify Playwright Script Execution - Success
description: Validates that the system correctly executes a Playwright script that is expected to pass.
preconditions: User is logged in to the TCMS.
A test case linked to a known passing Playwright script exists and has been triggered for execution.

steps.step: Monitor the execution status of the triggered test case.
steps.expected: The status changes from 'Running' to 'Passed'.

steps.step: Navigate to the 'Test Results' dashboard and view the specific test case result.
steps.expected: The result shows 'Passed' with relevant execution details (e.g., duration, logs).

title: Verify Playwright Script Execution - Failure
description: Validates that the system correctly executes a Playwright script that is expected to fail.
preconditions: User is logged in to the TCMS.
A test case linked to a known failing Playwright script exists and has been triggered for execution.

steps.step: Monitor the execution status of the triggered test case.
steps.expected: The status changes from 'Running' to 'Failed'.

steps.step: Navigate to the 'Test Results' dashboard and view the specific test case result.
steps.expected: The result shows 'Failed' with relevant error messages, stack traces, and potentially screenshots/videos.

title: Verify Playwright Script Execution - Error Handling
description: Validates the system's handling of Playwright scripts with syntax errors or runtime exceptions.
preconditions: User is logged in to the TCMS.
A test case linked to a Playwright script containing a syntax error or a runtime exception exists and has been triggered for execution.

steps.step: Monitor the execution status of the triggered test case.
steps.expected: The status changes from 'Running' to 'Error' or 'Failed'.

steps.step: Navigate to the 'Test Results' dashboard and view the specific test case result.
steps.expected: The result shows 'Error' or 'Failed' with detailed error messages and logs indicating the script issue.

title: Verify Test Results Display on Dashboard - Passed
description: Validates that the dashboard accurately displays results for passed test executions.
preconditions: User is logged in to the TCMS.
At least one test case has been executed successfully (passed).

steps.step: Navigate to the 'Dashboard' or 'Test Results' section.
steps.expected: The dashboard loads, displaying an overview of test results.

steps.step: Locate the recently passed test execution.
steps.expected: The execution is listed with a 'Passed' status, correct duration, and other relevant metadata.

steps.step: Click on the passed execution to view details.
steps.expected: A detailed view of the passed test case is displayed, showing steps, logs, and confirming 'Passed' status.

title: Verify Test Results Display on Dashboard - Failed
description: Validates that the dashboard accurately displays results for failed test executions, including error details.
preconditions: User is logged in to the TCMS.
At least one test case has been executed and failed.

steps.step: Navigate to the 'Dashboard' or 'Test Results' section.
steps.expected: The dashboard loads, displaying an overview of test results.

steps.step: Locate the recently failed test execution.
steps.expected: The execution is listed with a 'Failed' status, correct duration, and other relevant metadata.

steps.step: Click on the failed execution to view details.
steps.expected: A detailed view of the failed test case is displayed, showing steps, error messages, stack traces, and confirming 'Failed' status.

title: Verify Test Results Filtering and Sorting on Dashboard
description: Validates that users can filter and sort test results on the dashboard by various criteria (e.g., status, date, test suite).
preconditions: User is logged in to the TCMS.
Multiple test executions with varying statuses, dates, and associated test suites exist in the system.

steps.step: Navigate to the 'Dashboard' or 'Test Results' section.
steps.expected: The dashboard loads, displaying an overview of test results.
Only test executions with a 'Failed' status are displayed.

steps.step: Apply a filter for 'Date: Last 7 days'.
steps.expected: Only test executions from the last 7 days are displayed.
The most recent test executions are displayed at the top of the list.

title: Verify Concurrent Test Executions Handling
description: Validates that the system can handle multiple test executions triggered concurrently without data corruption or significant performance degradation.
preconditions: User is logged in to the TCMS.
Multiple independent test suites or a large number of individual test cases are available for execution.

steps.step: Simultaneously trigger the execution of 3-5 different test suites/large sets of test cases.
steps.expected: All triggered executions start and proceed without immediate errors.

steps.step: Monitor the status of all concurrent executions.
steps.expected: All executions complete with their correct respective statuses (Passed/Failed/Error).

steps.step: Review the results for each execution on the dashboard.
steps.expected: Results for each execution are accurately stored and displayed, without overlap or corruption from other concurrent runs.

title: Verify Dashboard Query Response Time - Small Data
description: Validates that dashboard queries respond within 2 seconds when displaying a small amount of test result data.
preconditions: User is logged in to the TCMS.
The system contains a small number of test results (e.g., < 100 executions).

steps.step: Navigate to the 'Dashboard' or 'Test Results' section.
steps.expected: The dashboard loads and displays results within 2 seconds.
The filtered results are displayed within 2 seconds.

title: Verify Dashboard Query Response Time - Large Data
description: Validates that dashboard queries respond within 2 seconds even when displaying a large amount of test result data.
preconditions: User is logged in to the TCMS.
The system contains a large number of test results (e.g., > 10,000 executions).

steps.step: Navigate to the 'Dashboard' or 'Test Results' section.
steps.expected: The dashboard loads and displays results within 2 seconds.

steps.step: Apply a complex filter (e.g., 'Status: Failed' AND 'Date: Last 30 days' AND 'Test Suite: Regression').
steps.expected: The filtered results are displayed within 2 seconds.

steps.step: Sort the results by a different column (e.g., 'Duration').
steps.expected: The sorted results are displayed within 2 seconds.

title: Verify Secure Authentication - Valid Credentials
description: Validates that a user can successfully log in using valid credentials and obtain a JWT.
preconditions: A valid user account (username/password) exists in the system.

steps.step: Navigate to the TCMS login page.
steps.expected: The login form is displayed.
Credentials are entered into the respective fields.
User is redirected to the dashboard, and a valid JWT is issued and stored (e.g., in local storage or cookies).

title: Verify Secure Authentication - Invalid Credentials
description: Validates that the system prevents login with invalid credentials and provides an appropriate error message.

steps.step: Navigate to the TCMS login page.
steps.expected: The login form is displayed.

steps.step: Enter an invalid username or password.
steps.expected: Invalid credentials are entered.
An error message like 'Invalid credentials' or 'Authentication failed' is displayed, and the user remains on the login page.

title: Verify Access to Protected Resources Without JWT
description: Validates that unauthorized users (without a valid JWT) cannot access protected resources.
preconditions: User is not logged in, or their JWT has expired/been removed.

steps.step: Attempt to directly navigate to a protected page URL (e.g., '/dashboard', '/test-cases').
steps.expected: The system redirects the user to the login page, or displays an 'Unauthorized' error message.

steps.step: Attempt to make an API request to a protected endpoint without a JWT.
steps.expected: The API returns a 401 Unauthorized or 403 Forbidden status code.

title: Verify JWT Token Expiration Handling
description: Validates that the system correctly handles JWT token expiration, requiring re-authentication.
preconditions: User is logged in to the TCMS.
The JWT token has a short expiration time configured for testing (e.g., 1 minute).

steps.expected: User is authenticated, and a JWT is issued.

steps.step: Wait for the JWT token to expire (e.g., 1 minute).
steps.expected: The token expires in the background.

steps.step: Attempt to perform an action that requires authentication (e.g., navigate to a different protected page, trigger test execution).
steps.expected: The system prompts the user to re-authenticate (e.g., redirects to login page or shows a session expired message).
